heroHeadline: Balikatan 2026 Set for April 20 with Japan Combat Troops as China CCG Brackets Batanes Islands
heroSubtitle: AFP Chief declares Balikatan 2026 the 'biggest ever' with Japan deploying combat-capable JSDF units for the first time since WWII; simultaneously three Chinese coast guard cutters bracket the Batanes Islands near the Bashi Channel in a 'new level of aggression.' Marcos EO 111 officially names 131 Kalayaan Island Group features, while PLA published combat readiness patrol video near Scarborough Shoal (Type 054A frigates + J-15s) in direct response to BRP Benguet near-collision
footerNote: Data sourced from CSIS AMTI, Philippine DFA/AFP/PCG, US Dept. of Defense, USNI News, Reuters, AP, South China Morning Post
